legacy.full_text:
BREAKING: @opensea takes the crown from @blur_io as the absolute plague of the entire NFT space. 

Congrats on bringing bidding and dumping back again 🖕.

Launch $SEA, let all of us dump it to zero and never come back again tyvm. https://t.co/S4mgStEGpA

IMO, every NFT collection should have its own shop embedded in its site.

Sell your own goods from your own shop, like Cryptopunk, like Ferrari, like Louis Vuitton.

Dress the shop. Hire your sales girl.

Public marketplaces are like outlets. No real luxury brands use outlets.
